message:
feat(term): viewport-priority reflow batching in Screen + resize_scheduler test robustness

screen.rs (+205 lines):
- Add viewport-priority reflow batch planning infrastructure directly
  in the Screen struct, complementing the core viewport_reflow_planner:
  - `ReflowBatchPriority` enum (Viewport/NearViewport/ColdScrollback)
    with `as_str()` and `rationale()` for structured logging
  - `ReflowBatchPlan` and `ViewportReflowPlan` structs for deterministic
    batch assignment with `full_scan()` fallback and
    `covers_each_logical_line_once()` invariant checker
  - `logical_line_physical_ranges()` helper decomposing wrapped physical
    lines into logical line ranges for reflow batching
  - `append_batches_for_indices()` helper for building batches from
    selected logical line indices at a given priority
  - Constants: MAX_REFLOW_BATCH_LOGICAL_LINES (64),
    REFLOW_OVERSCAN_ROW_MULTIPLIER (1), REFLOW_OVERSCAN_ROW_CAP (256)

resize_scheduler.rs (+25/-8):
- Fix lifecycle event ordering assertion: intent_seq 2 → 3 to match
  actual monotonic sequence after the third schedule_intent call
- Harden global snapshot test: replace single-shot assertion with a
  retry loop (up to 8 iterations) that verifies the sentinel pane
  update is present, eliminating a potential ordering flake in the
  global OnceLock/AtomicPtr pattern

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
